untranslatable_reason: Descending Broadening Formation requires precise measurement of formation height (difference between highest high and lowest low within the formation period) and application to trend lines. The pattern's measure rule for target calculation (adding/subtracting formation height to/from trend line values) cannot be expressed using standard indicators alone—it requires custom formation detection and geometric calculations not available in the indicator set. The conversion above provides breakout detection only, which is insufficient for the full pattern logic.
